commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed for real UI proof and normal review; there is no narrow code defect for an automated repair lane.; Cleared: The diff only changes Control UI render text, locale maps, and generated i18n metadata; no security or supply-chain sensitive surface is touched. commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces hard-coded Skill Workshop mode switcher labels with i18n keys and adds those keys to English plus generated locale bundles and i18n metadata.

PR surface: Source +188. Total +188 across 39 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main still has the five hard-coded Skill Workshop switcher strings in renderSkillWorkshopHeaderControls, and the raw-copy baseline lists those literals. I did not run a browser repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed for real UI proof and normal review; there is no narrow code defect for an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(ui): localize skill workshop switcher
target.body:
Splits out the i18n portion of #79745.

This PR localizes the Skill Workshop mode switcher (Board / Today) into all supported locales. It does not touch the qmd/mcporter memory path.

## Verification
- Cherry-picked from the original i18n commit in #79745.
- Checking formatting...
